cognitive_layer.purpose: Filter low-quality cells based on counts and gene detection. Cells with low counts may be empty droplets or dying cells. Cells with high counts may be doublets. Critical preprocessing before downstream analysis.

parameter_impact.min_counts: Lower bound on total RNA. Increasing removes more cells. Cells with low counts often represent noise.
parameter_impact.min_genes: Lower bound on detected genes. Increasing removes cells with few expressed genes.
parameter_impact.max_counts: Upper bound on RNA. Cells exceeding may be doublets or contaminated.
parameter_impact.max_genes: Upper bound on detected genes. Cells exceeding may be multiplets.

error_handling.ValueError: no filter thresholds: Provide at least one filter parameter

too_strict_removal_high.causal_chain: Lowering min_counts allows cells with less RNA to pass.

too_lenient_removal_low.expected_effect: Lower cell retention, higher mean counts

too_strict_removal_high.causal_chain: Lowering min_genes allows cells with fewer detected genes.

too_lenient_removal_low.causal_chain: Raising min_genes removes cells with fewer detected genes.
